# terrible_community_general_sendgrid (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `body` (String) The e-mail body content.
- `from_address` (String) The address in the "from" field for the email.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `subject` (String) The desired subject for the email.
- `to_addresses` (String) A list with one or more recipient email addresses.

### Optional

- `api_key` (String) Sendgrid API key to use instead of username/password.
- `attachments` (String) A list of relative or explicit paths of files you want to attach (7MB limit as per SendGrid docs).
- `bcc` (String) A list of email addresses to bcc.
- `cc` (String) A list of email addresses to cc.
- `from_name` (String) The name you want to appear in the from field, for example `John Doe`.
- `headers` (String) A dict to pass on as headers.
- `html_body` (Boolean) Whether the body is HTML content that should be rendered.
- `password` (String) Password that corresponds to the username. It is only required if `api_key` is not supplied.
- `username` (String) Username for logging into the SendGrid account. It is only required if `api_key` is not supplied.
